subcodes.first_line: We have mentioned thee aforetime, and in this hour wherein sorrows have encompassed Us from every quarter by reason of that which hath been wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرناک من قبل و فی هذا الحین الذی احاطتنا الاحزان من الاشطار بما اکتسبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital
